samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU. Supports various arithmetic and logical operations based on the provided opcode (aluc).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">6-bit control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">1-bit output indicating whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">1-bit output indicating whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">1-bit output indicating whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">1-bit output indicating whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">1-bit output representing a general flag, which is set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="ADD" value="6'b100000">Addition operation.</constant>
        <constant name="ADDU" value="6'b100001">Unsigned Addition operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SUB" value="6'b100010">Subtraction operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SUBU" value="6'b100011">Unsigned Subtraction operation.</constant>
        <constant name="AND" value="6'b100100">Bitwise AND operation.</constant>
        <constant name="OR" value="6'b100101">Bitwise OR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="XOR" value="6'b100110">Bitwise XOR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="NOR" value="6'b100111">Bitwise NOR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLT" value="6'b101010">Set Less Than operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLTU" value="6'b101011">Unsigned Set Less Than operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLL" value="6'b000000">Shift Left Logical operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRL" value="6'b000010">Shift Right Logical operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRA" value="6'b000011">Shift Right Arithmetic operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLLV" value="6'b000100">Shift Left Logical Variable operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRLV" value="6'b000110">Shift Right Logical Variable operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRAV" value="6'b000111">Shift Right Arithmetic Variable operation.</constant>
        <constant name="LUI" value="6'b001111">Load Upper Immediate operation.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign r[31:0] = res[31:0];>
            Assigns the lower 32 bits of the register (res) to the output (r).
        </assign>
        <assign flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1 : z;>
            Sets the flag output to '1' when the operation is SLT or SLTU, and 'z' (high-impedance) otherwise.
        </assign>
        <assign zero = ~(|res);>
            Sets the zero output to '1' when the result is all zeros, and '0' otherwise.
        </assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        The module performs various arithmetic and logical operations based on the control signal (aluc). It supports operations like ADD, SUB, AND, OR, XOR, NOR, SLT, SLTU, SLL, SRL, SRA, SLLV, SRLV, SRAV, and LUI. The results are stored in the register (res) and assigned to the output (r). The flag output indicates whether the operation was SLT or SLTU, while the zero output indicates if the result is zero.
    </implementation>
</module>
